Who is this for?

Business & Enterprise Teams

Build and deploy quickly across different use cases.

Buzooka lets you deploy anything, anywhere, landing pages, services, AI agents, and internal tools, using clean setups and flexible deployment workflows on your own cloud.

The Founder

Launch a serious product with scalable architecture.

Remove setup and deployment friction so your team can focus on building, testing, and improving core features and not configuring tools.

Agencies & IT Services

Deliver multiple projects that are - consistent, predictable and reliabile.

Standardizes project setup and deployment so you can reduce delivery time while maintaining predictable, production-grade outcomes.

Side-Project / Solo Builder

Building alone and your time is limited.

Skip repetitive setup, infrastructure, and deployment tasks so you can validate ideas and ship real products faster, without getting stuck in DevOps or boilerplate.

You are only limited by your imagination!

Strategy!

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does it take to launch an MVP with Buzooka?
With Buzooka, you can launch a production-ready MVP in days instead of weeks or months. Our AI-powered platform automates architecture, codebase generation, cloud infrastructure setup, and CI/CD pipeline configuration. Buzooka does not generate code specific to your product. The exact timeline depends on your project complexity, but most users have their MVP running within 2-5 days.
What tech stacks and frameworks does Buzooka support?
Buzooka supports a wide range of modern technologies including React, Svelte, Vue, Next.js for frontend development; Node.js, Python, and TypeScript for backend services; and Flutter for mobile app development. We also integrate with popular cloud providers like AWS, GCP, Azure, DigitalOcean, and Netlify. Our platform generates AI-friendly, well-architected code that follows industry best practices.
Do I own the code generated by Buzooka?
Yes, absolutely! You have complete ownership of all code generated by Buzooka. The codebase is delivered to your GitHub repository, and you maintain full control over it. There are no licensing restrictions or vendor lock-in. You can modify, extend, or even migrate away from Buzooka at any time. We believe in empowering founders with true ownership of their product.
How does Buzooka handle CI/CD and deployments?
Buzooka automatically sets up a complete CI/CD pipeline for your project. When you push code to your repository, and on-demand, it builds your application, and deploys it to your chosen cloud environment. We configure Docker containers, set up environment variables, manage database migrations, and handle zero-downtime deployments. You get a production-grade deployment workflow from day one.
What makes Buzooka's code "AI-friendly"?
AI-friendly code means the generated codebase is structured, documented, and organized in a way that AI coding assistants (like GitHub Copilot, Cursor, or Claude) can easily understand and work with. We use clear naming conventions, comprehensive comments, modular architecture, and consistent patterns. This makes it easier for you to extend your application using AI tools, significantly accelerating your development workflow.
